basic_details.job_title: Repco Bank Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Repco Bank has published the Manager (Chartered Accountant) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Manager (Chartered Accountant) positions. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding a Graduation degree from a recognized University along with Associate Membership of the Institute of Chartered Accountants and a minimum of 2 years post-qualification experience in a reputed organization, preferably a Financial Institution, are eligible to apply through the prescribed application process at repcobank.com. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 06

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years as on 31-05-2026. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/Repatriate: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, Ex-servicemen: 5 years, Candidates working in commercial/cooperative bank/financial institutions: equal to service duration max 5 years. No cumulative relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from a recognized University, Associate of the Institute of Chartered Accountants, Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience in reputed organization preferably Financial Institution
qualification.details: Graduation from a recognized University. Must be an 'Associate of the Institute of Chartered Accountants'. Minimum 2 years of work experience after completion of Chartered Accountancy, preferably in a Financial Institution. Exposure in Treasury operation, Statutory Audit, Internal Audit, Process Audit, and Knowledge in Risk Management is desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.repcobank.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Repco Bank Manager (Chartered Accountant) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Repco Bank Manager (Chartered Accountant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Repco Bank Manager (Chartered Accountant) recruitment is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post in Repco Bank.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation degree from a recognized University and be an 'Associate of the Institute of Chartered Accountants'.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post is 40 years as on 31-05-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Repco Bank Manager (Chartered Accountant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs.1200/- (Inclusive of GST) for all categories (General/OBC, SC/ST), which is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Chartered Accountant) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 64820 – 93960 Per Month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any work experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of post-qualification experience after completing Chartered Accountancy is required, preferably in a Financial Institution.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application should be submitted in offline mode by post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Repco Bank, which is www.repcobank.com.
